name: Eastern Iowa Airport area
headline: Mediterranean food near Eastern Iowa Airport (CID)
body: Flying out of CID hungry, or picking someone up and skipping the terminal kiosks? Pita Kabab sits at 3100 6th St SW on the same southwest corridor that carries traffic to and from the Eastern Iowa Airport — real shawarma, kabab platters and hummus instead of gate-area snacks. Order at the counter for a quick sit-down, or call (319) 440-3709 on your way and pick it up boxed for the road.

Heading up the SW corridor from CID, the counter at 3100 6th St SW is an easy on-the-way stop before the interstate.
